content.title: PanaPacks - Artisanal Food E-commerce Platform
content.short_description: PanaPacks is a production-ready static food e-commerce website built with Next
content.description: PanaPacks is a production-ready static food e-commerce website built with Next.js, featuring 25 premium artisanal food products. The platform provides a complete shopping experience with dynamic product filtering, persistent cart functionality, and seamless checkout integration. It's designed as a modern, mobile-first e-commerce solution optimized for performance and SEO through static site generation.
content.role: I built this complete e-commerce platform from scratch, implementing the full shopping cart system with Zustand state management, creating responsive React components with Tailwind CSS styling, and setting up the static site generation configuration. I developed the product catalog with 25 curated food items, implemented advanced filtering and sorting capabilities, and integrated Netlify Forms for order processing. I also designed the modern glassmorphism UI and ensured the entire application is optimized for static deployment.

achievements: Created a fully functional e-commerce platform with 25 premium products
Implemented persistent shopping cart with local storage for seamless user experience
Achieved static site generation for optimal performance and SEO
Integrated automated order processing through Netlify Forms
Delivered a production-ready application deployable with drag-and-drop simplicity

screenshots: Main product grid homepage with filtering interface
Shopping cart sidebar with item management
Product detail page with add to cart functionality
